author: doll-agent
content: Parent epic. Children: #685 (phase 0 scaffold), #686 (phase 1 core), #687 (phase 2 ufunc/stats), #688 (phase 3 linalg/fft/random), #689 (phase 4 window/poly/autodiff/strings/ma/stride_tricks), #690 (CI wheels), #691 (Claude skills). Architecture: single ferray-python cdylib crate, submodule layout matching NumPy (ferray.linalg, ferray.fft, ...), pyo3+numpy crates, reuses ferray-numpy-interop AsFerray/IntoNumPy traits for marshalling, maturin for wheel builds.
